message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxBackgroundColor #D9D9D9
  ArrowColor #333333
  MessageAlign left
}

actor "sidetree-core-go" as A

box "Instance 1" #D9D9D9
participant "Operation\nQueue" as Q1
end box

participant "orb.operation" as ORB

database "op-queue\nDB" as DB

box "Instance 2" #D9D9D9
participant "Operation\nQueue" as Q2
end box

== Subscriptions ==
Q1 -> ORB : Subscribe
activate ORB
ORB --> Q1 : ok
deactivate ORB

Q2 -> ORB : Subscribe
activate ORB
ORB --> Q2 : ok
deactivate ORB

== Add operations ==
A -> Q1 : Add(op1)
activate Q1
Q1 -> ORB : Publish(op1)
activate ORB
ORB --> Q1 : ok
deactivate ORB
Q1 --> A : ok
deactivate Q1

A -> Q2 : Add(op2)
activate Q2
Q2 -> ORB : Publish(op2)
activate ORB
ORB --> Q2 : ok
deactivate ORB
Q2 --> A : ok
deactivate Q2

== Delivery / handling ==
ORB -> Q1 : op2
activate Q1
Q1 --> ORB : ok
Q1 -> DB : Put(op2,handler1ID,expiry)
activate DB
DB --> Q1 : ok
deactivate DB
Q1 -> ORB : Ack(op2)
activate ORB
ORB --> Q1 : ok
deactivate ORB
deactivate Q1

ORB -> Q2 : op1
activate Q2
Q2 --> ORB : ok
Q2 -> DB : Put(op1,handler2ID,expiry)
activate DB
DB --> Q2 : ok
deactivate DB
Q2 -> ORB : Ack(op1)
activate ORB
ORB --> Q2 : ok
deactivate ORB
deactivate Q2

@enduml
```
